title: ceratostylis anceps
intro: Ceratostylis anceps, also known as the Split-Inflorescence Orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Ceratostylis anceps include the potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
